en-US.title: QR Code Genie
en-US.subtitle: Generate & Scan QR Codes
en-US.description:
Create, scan, and share QR codes instantly with QR Code Genie — the fast, beautiful, and privacy-friendly QR code tool.

KEY FEATURES:
• Instant QR Generation — Paste any URL, text, email, phone number, or Wi-Fi config and get a scannable QR code in seconds
• Built-in QR Scanner — Use your camera to scan and decode any QR code with real-time detection
• Save to Photos — Download your QR codes directly to your camera roll in high resolution
• Share Anywhere — Send QR codes via AirDrop, Messages, email, or any app on your phone
• Smart History — All your created and scanned QR codes are saved and organized for easy access
• Content Detection — Automatically recognizes URLs, emails, phone numbers, Wi-Fi configs, and plain text

WHY QR CODE GENIE?
No ads. No tracking. No account required. Just open the app, create or scan, and go. Your data stays on your device.

PERFECT FOR:
• Small business owners — Create QR codes for menus, flyers, and business cards
• Event organizers — Share links, tickets, and info via QR codes
• Students & teachers — Share documents, links, and resources
• Anyone who needs a fast, reliable QR code tool

Download QR Code Genie and start creating QR codes in seconds.
keywords: qr code,qr generator,qr scanner,qr maker,barcode,scan,create qr,qr reader,code generator,share
en-US.releaseNotes: Initial release of QR Code Genie! Create, scan, save, and share QR codes with a beautiful dark-themed interface.
